extra.reason: OOD gate is now evaluated and failure summary atomically published before any checkpoint directory is created; passing checkpoints publish by atomic directory rename; regressions cover pass, gate failure and save failure.
Fixed timeout rows to initialize as label=timeout/reward=0, validate finite scores and batch cardinality, with regressions covering timeout-before/after-success.

Seed zero is preserved through inherited truthiness logic and population seeds are drawn uniquely with deterministic order-preserving rejection sampling; validation occurs before actor RPCs and regressions cover both.
Replaced inherited N+1 fit loop with exact range(num_iterations), final-state evaluation and atomic checkpoint publication; regression proves exactly three updates for num_iterations=3.
QA eval now uses atomic_json_write (fsync plus atomic rename); failure injection proves prior artifact survives a rename failure, and focused tests pass.

Moved perturbation and generation RPC creation inside guarded loops; partial perturb dispatch now poisons immediately, and partial generation dispatch flows through restoration before the wave aborts.
RUN_DIR is now an atomic mkdir claim before GPU preflight and before ATTEMPT publication; focused single-owner test passes.
Removed rank-equals-GPU assumption while retaining exact types and the one-to-one set proof; added a permuted-order binding test.
Moved import ray inside the fixed whole-construction watchdog; focused V65B tests pass.
Added exact-int checks to both GPU validators and float-alias mutation coverage in both test suites.
Cadence now uses completed_steps=iteration+1 and passes that exact state label; regressions cover eval_freq 1 and 2.
launch_engines now populates self.pgs and self.engines incrementally before readiness/next actor operations.
Added close_trainer_preserving_primary using sys.exception; regression proves the original exception identity survives with a cleanup note.
Added a shared healthy-state assertion to QA eval, OOD scoring and atomic checkpoint publication; poisoned save regression passes.
Marked cleanup/success ownership before REPORT publication, made JSON console output best-effort, and made failure publication refuse durable report/finalized claims; tests pass.
Added disarming state and nested timer/handler restoration with a pending-repeat regression.
Introduced V65BActorWaitTimeout at bounded Ray/generation sites and separated it from generic timeout invalidation.
Wrapped the entire live execute path with fixed handlers and idempotent early-failure publication; test proves handler installation precedes guarded work.
terminal_artifact_lock_v65b now uses LOCK_NB with the sealed 300s deadline; builder/finalizer scope and a contention test were updated.
Added sanitized_cli_v65b with hash-only stderr output and an adversarial raw-text regression.

Canonical FP32 full-weight state, non-reused deterministic noise, exact restore, all-GPU FP32 update, integrity poisoning, resumable checkpoints, adversarial regressions, and Qwen3.6 hardware evidence are complete.
